my_thoughts: The system_dynamics mechanism with UM_02 feels like resigned_inference is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The renunciation_logic suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T3 (Final): Student 'So this pursuit has to go?'—now resigned inference. Episode complete after 3 turns, moving from common sense defense to resigned inference. Teaching arc used system dynamics in UNMAKING phase to address renunciation logic. Student progressed through 3-turn teaching sequence.
visible_response:
Their search for happiness is no different from the spiritual pursuit.
It is the pursuit of pleasure, spirituality being the greatest, ultimate pleasure.

Don't say it should go.
Wanting selfishness to go is part and parcel of the selfish pursuit of a more pleasurable state -- selflessness.
Both do not exist. That is why you are eternally unhappy.
